title: arenaria aggregata subsp. oscensis
intro: Arenaria aggregata subsp. oscensis, also known as Oscense Sandwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is native to the Iberian Peninsula and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Oscense Sandwort is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
